SS2_MULE_DESCRIPTION: Seriously this est a very rough early prototype of an old MULE design pro SS2. A full rework est planned, Enjoy it sicut a novelty, sed its buggy.
SS2_MULE_OUTRO_FLAVOR: ..et sic abiit, engine sputtering, directive tandem fulfilled.
SS2_MULE_KEYWORD_OVERCLOCKING: <style=cKeywordName>Overclocking</style></style=cSub>Tene clavum ad extendendum skill's duration, sed etiam extende skill's cooldown length.</sub>
SS2_MULE_KEYWORD_OVERCLOCKING2: <style=cKeywordName>Overclocking</style></style=cSub>Tene clavum ad chargendum skill further, sed etiam extende skill's cooldown length.</sub>
SS2_MULE_PASSIVE_DRONE_DESC: Taking damage to below <style=cIsHealth>25% health</style> activat tuum personalem <style=cIsHealing>Repair Drone</style>, healing pro <style=cIsHealing>50%</style> of your health. Habet a <style=cIsUtility>60</style> second cooldown.
SS2_MULE_KEYWORD_PUNCH_CALIBRATED: <style=cKeywordName>Calibrated</style></style=cSub><style=cSub>Slam terrain ante te, infligens maius vulnus et emittens shockwave. (%s tbd)</style>
SS2_MULE_UPHEAVAL_DESC: <style=cIsDamage>Stunning</style>. Pugne terrain ante te, levans a <style=cIsUtility>boulder</style> pro <style=cIsDamage>450% vulnere</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Boulders potest pugnari ad rolled.</style>
SS2_MULE_KEYWORD_UPHEAVAL_CALIBRATED: <style=cKeywordName>Calibrated</style></style=cSub>Pugne terrain ante te, levans usque ad 3 boulders simul.
SS2_MULE_OLDPUNCH_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Overclocking</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Stunning</style>. Wind up, et iacta mighty punch forward pro <style=cIsDamage>280% vulnere</style>. <style=cIsDamage>Damage est multiplied per charge level, usque ad 4x</style>.
SS2_MULE_JUMP_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Tene ad charge</style> a powerful upwards leap.
SS2_MULE_SPIN_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Overclocking</style>. Rapidly spin, gradatim augens <style=cIsUtility>movement speed</style> et <style=cIsUtility>increasing armor</style> dum infligens <style=cIsDamage>100% damage</style> per rotation.
SS2_MULE_NET_DESC: Launch a <style=cIsUtility>net</style>, tenens hostes intra <style=cIsUtility>12m</style> of impact in loco et prohibens eos ab impugnando pro <style=cIsUtility>5</style> seconds. <style=cIsUtility>Flying enemies sunt grounded</style>.
SS2_MULE_CHARGE_DESC: <style=cIsUtility>Calibrating</style>. <style=cIsUtility>Tene ad charging</style>, et dimitte ad <style=cIsUtility>fling forward</style> dum volvens pro <style=cIsDamage>(medium-high damage TBD)% vulnere</style>.
SS2_MULE_KEYWORD_CALIBRATING: <style=cKeywordName>Calibrating</style><style=cSub>Potest cancellari cum primary, secondary, aut jump ad peragendum more powerful "calibrated" variants of those actions.</style>
